text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I was practicing for a performance earlier...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But the speakers had been set to the wrong
volume.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I was standing near them, so now my head and
ears are ringing, and the ringing won't go away...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Bigger is always better... except when it comes to
decibel levels, I suppose... Owww...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being exposed to such loud sounds has given
Hishi Akebono a really bad headache...
